case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ANTHONY BENNETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 SIXTH STREET, UNIT #424, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCC UPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, ANTHONY
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED COPY RETURNED IN SASE)
